/* IALDF Resource Center — inline downloads.
   Each file is base64-encoded so downloads work in any context
   (preview, standalone HTML, or on any web server). */
window.IALDF_DOWNLOADS = {
  "IALDF_KYR_Card_ICE_Encounter.pdf": { mime: "application/pdf", b64: "" },
  "IALDF_Family_Preparedness_Card.pdf": { mime: "application/pdf", b64: "" },
  "IALDF_Family_Preparedness_Plan.pdf": { mime: "application/pdf", b64: "" },
  "IALDF_Documentation_Checklist.pdf": { mime: "application/pdf", b64: "" },
  "IALDF_Attorney_Prep_Sheet.pdf": { mime: "application/pdf", b64: "" },
  "IALDF_Template_Employer_Letter.docx": { mime: "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document", b64: "" },
  "IALDF_Template_School_Letter.docx": { mime: "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document", b64: "" },
  "IALDF_Template_USCIS_Case_Inquiry.docx": { mime: "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document", b64: "" },
  "IALDF_Template_Expedite_Request.docx": { mime: "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document", b64: "" }
};

(function () {
  function b64ToBlob(b64, mime) {
    const bin = atob(b64);
    const bytes = new Uint8Array(bin.length);
    for (let i = 0; i < bin.length; i++) bytes[i] = bin.charCodeAt(i);
    return new Blob([bytes], { type: mime });
  }

  document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    const a = e.target.closest('a[data-download]');
    if (!a) return;
    const name = a.getAttribute('data-download');
    const file = window.IALDF_DOWNLOADS[name];
    if (!file) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    const blob = b64ToBlob(file.b64, file.mime);
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const trigger = document.createElement('a');
    trigger.href = url;
    trigger.download = name;
    document.body.appendChild(trigger);
    trigger.click();
    document.body.removeChild(trigger);
    setTimeout(function () { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); }, 1000);
  });
})();
